channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox hit by car moved out road, 5th July
item.description:
In Barnehurst on mayplace road east in disused car park next to phoenix football FC
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Road East, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction fly tipping, 5th July
item.description:
It looks like builders have left their construction waste outside 68 Woodberry Grove, N4 1SN, where they have been renovating. If a bulky waste collection has not been booked, could this be investigated.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Floods, 5th July
item.description:
I don’t know the actual problem but water drains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Addison Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire hazard- lots of wood dumped by neighbour, 5th July
item.description:
A massive pile of planks of wood has been dumped by a neighbour after redoing their garden. It is a potential fire hazard . It is next to thr bins outside the flats.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-136, Chilton Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven tarmac outside 31 Charmouth Road, 5th July
item.description:
The tarmac around the tree is now quite raised due to roots from the adjacent tree. The ground is now quite uneven and is a potential trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple trees have low hanging branches in Charmouth Road outside 31 & 33, 5th July
item.description:
The branches are low hanging on a few trees in the road, especially outside number 31 & 33. They are also having low into the road. Also the trees are getting quite high and may need pruning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overgrowing into cycle lane, 4th July
item.description:
Trees growing into cycle lane - will need addressing at some point.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Gipsy Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees obscuring traffic lights, 4th July
item.description:
Tree growth obscures traffic lights - cannot see red light coming up the hill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Gipsy Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 broken lamp post lights., 4th July
item.description:
The lights are broken and it makes me feel unsafe to walk home alone.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Mayfly Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked up on space unlocked, 4th July
item.description:
Have heard it’s been stolen and dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism & fire threat, 4th July
item.description:
There is a large group of up to 15 teenagers who are congregating in this area seem trying to light a fire removing the bricks and throwing them across the gardens. They were aware that I was watching as I use these Park several times a day with my dog I did not phone police. I don’t want to become a target. Both times I have seen them usually late afternoon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Priory Avenue, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Hopton Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge along school fence line (Alsike Road), 4th July
item.description:
On the grass verge between school fence and parked cars the following have been dumped: sofa, armchair, fridge freezer, cooker, tumble dryer, bags of rubble, toys, Black bags. A total eyesore outside a school, risk of items damaging cars, risk of fire. URGENT REMOVAL NEEDED!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike blocking pavement, 4th July
item.description:
I don’t have the number of the bike but it’s blocking the whole pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Camden Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road traffic sign abandoned, 4th July
item.description:
This sign is for works carrried out over two months ago. It seems to have been abandoned or forgotten

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Urlwin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not working, 4th July
item.description:
The street lights around John Gorsuch House and Daniels Road are not working. The area doesn’t feel safe and is attracting group of people who are hanging out late at night to play music.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniels Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I know this is private land but the flytip is mainly foodstuff, 4th July
item.description:
I know this is private land but the flytip consists of bags of food waste which is a health hazard as attracting foxes and rats Can this be reviewed by environment health and appropriate action be taken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zip line is locked, 4th July
item.description:
Someone put a lock on the Zip line, so kids no longer can ride it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wirral Wood Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Bromley Hill & Park Avenue, 4th July
item.description:
Badly damaged pavement and manhole. Potentially very dangerous for pedestrians as very near to busy road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Hill, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Tons of building waste, 4th July
item.description:
Tons of building waste has just been dumped at the bins. Some of it has just been strewn on the ground
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66-80, Druid Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
